message:
Fix recursive call allocator detection + add tech debt section

- Detect recursive function calls that use allocator parameter
- Prevents "pointless discard" error for functions like fib()
- Add Tech Debt section to CLAUDE.md for tracking future work
- Verified: bench_fib achieves 28x speedup over CPython
